description.en: QS World University Rankings is an annual publication of university rankings by Quacquarelli Symonds (QS). First published in 2004, it is one of the most widely consulted international university rankings globally. The rankings evaluate over 1,500 universities from 104 locations based on research quality, employability outcomes, learning experience, global engagement, and sustainability. QS uses six key indicators: Academic Reputation (30%), Citations per Faculty (20%), Employer Reputation (15%), Faculty Student Ratio (10%), International Faculty Ratio (5%), International Student Ratio (5%), and Sustainability (5%). The rankings are trusted by students, employers, and educational institutions worldwide for their comprehensive methodology and emphasis on employability and real-world impact.
description.zh: QS世界大学排名是由Quacquarelli Symonds (QS)发布的年度大学排名。该排名首次发布于2004年,是全球最广泛参考的国际大学排名之一。排名评估来自104个地区的1500多所大学,基于研究质量、就业能力成果、学习体验、全球参与度和可持续发展等维度。QS使用六大核心指标:学术声誉(30%)、师均引用率(20%)、雇主声誉(15%)、师生比(10%)、国际教师比例(5%)、国际学生比例(5%)和可持续发展(5%)。该排名因其全面的方法论以及对就业能力和实际影响力的强调而受到全球学生、雇主和教育机构的信赖。

en: Overall University Rankings - Global rankings of 1,500+ universities across 104 locations
Academic Reputation - Peer review assessments from academics worldwide
Citations per Faculty - Research impact measured by faculty-normalized citations
Employer Reputation - Graduate employability ratings from employer surveys
Faculty Student Ratio - Teaching quality indicator based on student-faculty ratios
International Faculty Ratio - Proportion of international academic staff
International Student Ratio - Proportion of international students enrolled
International Research Network - Global research collaboration metrics
Sustainability Rankings - Environmental and social responsibility indicators
Employment Outcomes - Graduate employment rates and career success metrics
Subject Rankings - Rankings by academic discipline and field of study
Regional Rankings - University rankings by geographic region
QS Stars Ratings - Detailed institutional performance assessments beyond rankings
zh: 综合大学排名 - 覆盖104个地区1500多所大学的全球排名
学术声誉 - 来自全球学者的同行评审评估
师均引用率 - 通过教师标准化引用衡量研究影响力
雇主声誉 - 基于雇主调查的毕业生就业能力评级
师生比 - 基于学生与教师比例的教学质量指标
国际教师比例 - 国际学术人员占比
国际学生比例 - 国际学生入学占比
国际研究网络 - 全球研究合作指标
可持续发展排名 - 环境和社会责任指标
就业成果 - 毕业生就业率和职业成功指标
学科排名 - 按学科和研究领域的排名
地区排名 - 按地理区域的大学排名
QS星级评定 - 超越排名的详细院校绩效评估
